name: agent-team-dev
description: Development marketplace for the agent-team Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: agent-team
plugins.description: Two subskills for Claude Code agent team coordination — agent-team:lead orchestrates a team, agent-team:teammate guides each worker. Covers inbox sync protocol, no-nested-teams constraint, spawn templates, and the shutdown sequence. Optional reference docs layer the superpowers + code-review development workflow on top.
